composition: A chalk-rendered classical philosopher bust is centered or slightly offset on a dark blackboard background, with loose sketch lines adding depth and a hand-drawn feel.
typography: White bold sans-serif text is placed near the bottom or lower-center, clean and legible at moderate size against the dark field.
hook_text: 2 Hours of Philosophy That Will Rewire Your Brain
color_palette: Dark charcoal/slate dominant, white chalk accent, subtle warm grey midtones
click_worthy_reason: The neurological framing ('Rewire Your Brain') creates a sense of transformative power, making the viewer feel the content offers a tangible, almost physical benefit.
